positive: A minimalist line art drawing of a celestial map. Depict constellations, the moon, and planets connected by delicate, flowing lines. Use only black ink on a cream background. Elegant, clean, geometric, suitable for embroidery or print on paper goods.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, shading, color fills, messy lines
